allow: PowerShell($src = "c:\\Users\\LENOVO\\Desktop\\elecV\\ElecVendors\\Dashboard-Recommendations.html"; $dst = "c:\\Users\\LENOVO\\Desktop\\elecV\\ElecVendors\\Dashboard-Recommendations.docx"; $word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\($src\); $doc.SaveAs2\([ref]$dst, [ref]16\); $doc.Close\(\); $word.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($word\) | Out-Null; Remove-Item $src; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { "OK $\(\(Get-Item $dst\).Length\) bytes" } else { "FAIL" })
